title: ASCEND & RCMI Fall 2023 Faculty Development Opportunities Newsletter (PDF)
content: Newsletter listing the Fall 2023 Faculty Development Opportunities offered by MSU's ASCEND (A Student-Centered, Entrepreneurship Development training model) and RCMI (Research Centers in Minority Institutions) programs — research-relevant trainings hosted by MSU units outside ORA. The only artifact documented on the 'MSU Trainings Outside ORA' page as of 2026-05-14.
